reason: This is a bootstrap launch of the new `run-003` chain after `decision-012` already killed the prior `F_SS(1/12)` dynamic-audit branch. The active chain now targets the exact gap exposed by `step-008` by requiring an audited exact realization, an explicit finite-closure convention, same-currency provenance, and a cancellation taxonomy before any promoted closure claim. Nothing in the current record invalidates that new branch, and the planning run chose it precisely because it is the best next mission-level use of the Step-8 negative without overclaiming mission completion.
next_logical_chain_step: Freeze The Inherited Ledger, Provenance Burden, Remaining Freedoms, And Claim Scope
